bundleSize._doc: Gzip-size budget for dist/en-lightbox.js. The bundle-size contract (check_size.mjs) fails if the gzip size exceeds maxGzipBytes. Baseline: 1809B gzip (wave-0 core). After wave-0 backfill (a11y slice): ~2300B. Wave-1 (triggers + dismissal): 3058B gzip. Budget set to 3100B with headroom. Re-baseline after wave-2 themes (Decision D-size).
